    • build

      The built object.

    • charset

      public FileStore.Builder charset(Charset value)
      Charset for external files.

      Identifies the charset of external files.

      Parameters:
      value - The new value for this property.
      The default is the first value found:
      • System property "ConfigFileStore.charset"
      • Environment variable "CONFIGFILESTORE_CHARSET"
      • Charset.defaultCharset()

      Cannot be null.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • copy

      public FileStore.Builder copy()
      Description copied from class: Context.Builder
      Copy creator.
      Specified by:
      copy in class Context.Builder<FileStore.Builder>
      Returns:
      A new mutable copy of this builder.

    • directory

      public FileStore.Builder directory(File value)
      Local file system directory.

      Identifies the path of the directory containing the configuration files.

      Parameters:
      value - The new value for this property.
      The default is the first value found:
      • System property "ConfigFileStore.directory"
      • Environment variable "CONFIGFILESTORE_DIRECTORY"
      • ".".

      Cannot be null.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • directory

      public FileStore.Builder directory(String value)
      Local file system directory.

      Identifies the path of the directory containing the configuration files.

      Parameters:
      value - The new value for this property.
      The default is the first value found:
      • System property "ConfigFileStore.directory"
      • Environment variable "CONFIGFILESTORE_DIRECTORY"
      • "."

      Cannot be null.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • enableWatcher

      public FileStore.Builder enableWatcher()
      Use watcher.

      Use a file system watcher for file system changes.

      Notes:
      • Calling FileStore.close() closes the watcher.

      The default is the first value found:

      • System property "ConfigFileStore.enableWatcher"
      • Environment variable "CONFIGFILESTORE_ENABLEWATCHER"
      • false.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • extensions

      public FileStore.Builder extensions(String value)
      File extensions.

      Defines what file extensions to search for when the config name does not have an extension.

      Parameters:
      value - The new value for this property. The default is the first value found:
      • System property "ConfigFileStore.extensions"
      • Environment variable "CONFIGFILESTORE_EXTENSIONS"
      • "cfg"

      Cannot be null.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • updateOnWrite

      public FileStore.Builder updateOnWrite()
      Update-on-write.

      When enabled, the FileStore.update(String, String) method will be called immediately following calls to FileStore.write(String, String, String) when the contents are changing.
      This allows for more immediate responses to configuration changes on file systems that use polling watchers.
      This may cause double-triggering of ConfigStoreListeners.

      The default is the first value found:

      • System property "ConfigFileStore.updateOnWrite"
      • Environment variable "CONFIGFILESTORE_UPDATEONWRITE"
      • false.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • watcherSensitivity

      public FileStore.Builder watcherSensitivity(WatcherSensitivity value)
      Watcher sensitivity.

      Determines how frequently the file system is polled for updates.

      Notes:
      • This relies on internal Sun packages and may not work on all JVMs.
      Parameters:
      value - The new value for this property.
      The default is the first value found:
      • System property "ConfigFileStore.watcherSensitivity"
      • Environment variable "CONFIGFILESTORE_WATCHERSENSITIVITY"
      • WatcherSensitivity.MEDIUM

      Cannot be null.
      Returns:
      This object.
